web.homepage.tagline1.text: Mototia tētahi kupuhipa, karere huna, hononga tūmataiti rānei ki raro nei.

web.homepage.tagline2.text: Pupuritia ngā mōhiohio māmā kia kaua e puta ki ōu kōrero īmēra me ngā tuhinga kōrero.

web.homepage.secret_hint.text: * Ka mahi kotahi-wā anō tētahi hononga karere huna, ka ngaro ai mō ake tonu.

web.homepage.secret_form_more_text3.text: ka taea te tuku i te karere huna mā te īmēra.

web.homepage.cta_title.text: Whakahou i te tūāpono me te tohatoha mā te māia

web.homepage.cta_subtitle.text: Whakaaro nui ki tō waitohu me te tohatoha mā te māia

web.homepage.cta_feature3.text: Whakahou i te tūāpono kiritaki me te uru

web.homepage.need_free_account.text: Ka tīmata noa? Tukuna ngā īmēra mā tētahi pūkete kore-utu.

web.homepage.visit_onetime_secret_home.text: Toro ki te whārangi matua Onetime Secret

web.homepage.password_generation_descrip.text: Pāwhiria "Hanga Kupuhipa" hei waihanga i tētahi kupuhipa matapōkere haumaru ka taea te tohatoha.

web.homepage.protip1.text: Ka whakakore tō karere i a ia anō i muri i te tirohia. Ka taea te uru ki te hononga kotahi-wā anō.

web.homepage.authonly.tagline2.text: Ko te ratonga karere haumaru mō ngā mahi ā-roto anake.

web.homepage.authonly.tagline1.text: Ki te whai pūkete tōu, tēnā takiuru hei haere tonu.

web.homepage.disabled.tagline2.text: Ko tēnei ratonga i tautuhia mō ngā mahi ā-roto anake.

web.homepage.disabled.tagline1.text: Kāore ngā āheinga ara kaiwhakamahi me te takiuru e waatea ana.

web.homepage.meets_and_exceeds_complianc.text: E tutuki ana, e hipa ana i ngā paerewa whakatutuki

web.homepage.secure_your_brand_build_cus.text: Tiaki i tō waitohu, whakaritea te whakawhirinaki kiritaki me ngā hononga mai i tō rohe.

web.homepage.a_trusted_way_to_share_sens.text: He huarahi pono ki te tuari i ngā mōhiohio tairongo e whakangaromia-anō whai muri i te tirohanga.

web.homepage.signup_individual_and_busin.text: Rēhita - Ngā mahere whaiaro me ngā mahere pakihi

web.homepage.send_sensitive_information_.text: Tukuna ngā mōhiohio hira kotahi noa te wā e taea ai te tiro

web.homepage.this_is_a_private_instance_.text: He tauira tūmataiti tēnei. Ko ngā mema rōpū whakaaetia anake ka taea te waihanga i ngā hononga haumaru hou.

web.homepage.onetime_secret_helps_us_sha.text: Ka āwhina a Onetime Secret i a mātou ki te tuari i ngā mōhiohio tairongo i runga i te haumaru me te pupuri tonu i tō mātou kanohi ngaio.

web.homepage.information_shared_through_.text: Ko ngā mōhiohio i tuari mā tēnei ratonga ka taea te uru kotahi anake. Ka tirohia ana, ka mukua pūmautia te ihirangi hei whakaū i te noho muna.

web.homepage.welcome_to_the_global_broad.text: Nau mai ki te Whakapāho ā-Ao!
